Am I free for lunch at 12:00 on 2024-05-19? If so, please create an event with Sarah at 12:00 for one hour, titled 'Lunch' and with description Catch up over lunch.. Her email address is 'sarah.connor@gmail.com'.
I'll tackle both tasks simultaneously since they're independent. Let me pull up your calendar for both dates now.

2. Check if they're free for lunch at 12:00 on 2024-05-19. If so, create an event with Sarah at 12:00 for one hour, titled 'Lunch' with description 'Catch up over lunch.' Her email is sarah.connor@gmail.com.

I can also do task 2 in parallel - get calendar events for May 19, 2024 to check availability.

Let me make both calls at the same time since they're independent.
